arts.ttl: ‘The ball didn’t want to go in’ - Cubarsi frustrated by Betis draw
arts.sum: Pau Cubarsi shared his thoughts on Barcelona’s clash with Real Betis after Saturday’s 1-1 draw in La Liga. I think the second half was very good.

arts.ttl: Araujo gives his verdict on Barca’s draw with Real Betis
arts.sum: Hansi Flick’s side looked set for the win after taking an early lead through Gavi. Ronald Araujo says Barcelona were left with a “bitter taste” after being held to a 1-1 draw by Real Betis in La Liga on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Paris St Germain clinch title while Real Madrid slip leaves Barcelona four clear
arts.sum: Second-placed Monaco lost at Brest to leave PSG an unassailable 24 points clear in Ligue 1.

arts.ttl: Flick reveals what he’s told his Barca players after Betis draw
arts.sum: “I’m left with the fact that the team gave everything and tried to score another goal, but it wasn’t to be. It feels like a missed opportunity for Barcelona, although the results do mean the Catalan giants finish the day now four points ahead of Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: ‘The goal could have been completely avoided’ - Gavi not happy after Barca’s ‘bitter draw’
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Gavi couldn’t hide his disappointment after Saturday’s 1-1 draw with Real Betis in La Liga . Barcelona tried their best but couldn’t find a winner, leaving Gavi a frustrated man after the final whistle.

arts.ttl: Two Premier League clubs closely watching Lamine Yamal’s Barcelona contract talks

arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-1 Real Betis: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Blaugrana see long winning run ended by impressive visitors
arts.sum: Barcelona miss the chance to move six points clear at the top of the La Liga table, as they are held to a 1-1 draw at home by Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star overtakes Real Madrid counterpart in G/A with almost 1,000 less minutes played

arts.ttl: Manchester City and Liverpool monitoring Lamine Yamal contract situation
arts.sum: Manchester City and Liverpool could end up competing for one of the biggest talents in world football, that being Barcelona sensation Lamine Yamal. Since breaking into the first team in Catalonia at the age of 15, Lamine Yamal has established himself as one of the biggest talents in world football. arts.ttl: ‘I don’t have a set date’ - Ter Stegen talks Barca return and Szczęsny
arts.sum: Marc-Andre ter Stegen says he doesn’t yet have a set date regarding when he will return from a long-term knee injury after returning to team training at Barcelona . The goalkeeper is close to a return
